title: bauhinia coccinea subsp. tonkinensis
intro: Bauhinia coccinea subsp. tonkinensis, also known as Tonkin orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues, and is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting immune system function. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in the form of a tincture or powder.
